  3537	class ExtractParametersRequest(BaseModel):
  3538	    """Request for parameter extraction from various sources."""
  3539	    source: str = Field(..., description="Source type: 'image', 'aggregated', or 'description'")
  3540	    image_index: Optional[int] = Field(None, description="Image index for source='image'")
  3541	
  3542	
  3543	class ExtractParametersResponse(BaseModel):
  3544	    """Response with extracted parameters."""
  3545	    parameters: Dict[str, Any]
  3546	    source: str
  3547	    confidence: Optional[float] = None
  3548	    preview_count: Optional[int] = None
  3549	
  3550	
  3551	@v2_packs_router.post("/{pack_name}/parameters/extract", response_model=ExtractParametersResponse)
  3552	def extract_pack_parameters(
  3553	    pack_name: str,
  3554	    request: ExtractParametersRequest,
  3555	    store=Depends(require_initialized),
  3556	):
  3557	    """Extract generation parameters from pack previews or description.
  3558	
  3559	    Sources:
  3560	    - 'image': Extract from specific preview image metadata (requires image_index)
  3561	    - 'aggregated': Aggregate from all preview images with metadata
  3562	    - 'description': Parse pack description for recommended parameters
  3563	
  3564	    Returns extracted parameters with confidence score for aggregated results.
  3565	    """
  3566	    from ..utils.parameter_extractor import (
  3567	        extract_from_image_meta,
  3568	        aggregate_from_previews,
  3569	        extract_from_description,
  3570	    )
  3571	
  3572	    try:
  3573	        pack = store.get_pack(pack_name)
  3574	
  3575	        if request.source == 'image':
  3576	            # Extract from specific preview image
  3577	            if request.image_index is None:
  3578	                raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="image_index required for source='image'")
  3579	
  3580	            if request.image_index < 0 or request.image_index >= len(pack.previews):
  3581	                raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=f"Invalid image_index: {request.image_index}")
  3582	
  3583	            preview = pack.previews[request.image_index]
  3584	            if not preview.meta:
  3585	                return ExtractParametersResponse(
  3586	                    parameters={},
  3587	                    source='image',
  3588	                    confidence=0.0,
  3589	                )
  3590	
  3591	            result = extract_from_image_meta(preview.meta)
  3592	            return ExtractParametersResponse(
  3593	                parameters=result.parameters,
  3594	                source='image',
  3595	                confidence=result.confidence,
  3596	            )
  3597	
  3598	        elif request.source == 'aggregated':
  3599	            # Aggregate from all previews with metadata
  3600	            previews_with_meta = [
  3601	                {'meta': p.meta}
  3602	                for p in pack.previews
  3603	                if p.meta
  3604	            ]
  3605	
  3606	            if not previews_with_meta:
  3607	                return ExtractParametersResponse(
  3608	                    parameters={},
  3609	                    source='aggregated',
  3610	                    confidence=0.0,
  3611	                    preview_count=0,
  3612	                )
  3613	
  3614	            result = aggregate_from_previews(previews_with_meta)
  3615	            return ExtractParametersResponse(
  3616	                parameters=result.parameters,
  3617	                source='aggregated',
  3618	                confidence=result.confidence,
  3619	                preview_count=len(previews_with_meta),
  3620	            )
  3621	
  3622	        elif request.source == 'description':
  3623	            # Extract from pack description using AI service
  3624	            if not pack.description:
  3625	                return ExtractParametersResponse(
  3626	                    parameters={},
  3627	                    source='description',
  3628	                    confidence=0.0,
  3629	                )
  3630	
  3631	            from src.avatar.ai_service import AvatarAIService
  3632	
  3633	            ai_service = AvatarAIService()
  3634	            ai_result = ai_service.extract_parameters(pack.description)
  3635

  3640	                    normalized = GenerationParameters(**ai_result.output)

  3642	                    params = {

  3646	                except Exception as e:

  3657	                    parameters={},

  3659	                    confidence=0.0,

  3663	            raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=f"Invalid source: {request.source}")

  5416	@ai_router.get("/tasks")

   326	
   327	// =============================================================================
   328	// Main Component
   329	// =============================================================================
   330	
   331	export function PackParametersSection({
   332	  parameters,
   333	  modelInfo,
   334	  onEdit,
   335	  animationDelay = 0,
   336	}: PackParametersSectionProps) {
   337	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   338	  const [isCollapsed, setIsCollapsed] = useState(false)
   339	
   340	  // Collect and categorize all parameters
   341	  const categorizedParams = useMemo(() => {
   342	    const result: Record<CategoryKey, Array<{ key: string; value: string; highlight: boolean }>> = {
   343	      generation: [],
   344	      resolution: [],
   345	      hires: [],
   346	      model: [],
   347	      controlnet: [],
   348	      inpainting: [],
   349	      batch: [],
   350	      advanced: [],
   351	      sdxl: [],
   352	      freeu: [],
   353	      ipadapter: [],
   354	      custom: [],
   355	    }
   356	
   357	    // Add strength_recommended from modelInfo if present
   358	    if (modelInfo?.strength_recommended != null) {
   359	      result.generation.push({
   360	        key: 'strength_recommended',
   361	        value: formatParamValue('strength_recommended', modelInfo.strength_recommended, t),
   362	        highlight: true,
   363	      })
   364	    }
   365	
   366	    // Process all parameters
   367	    if (parameters) {
   368	      // Special handling for resolution - combine width & height
   369	      const hasResolution = parameters.width != null && parameters.height != null
   370	      // Get list of fields that came from AI extraction
   371	      const aiFields = (parameters._ai_fields as string[] | undefined) ?? []
   372	
   373	      for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(parameters)) {
   374	        if (value === null || value === undefined) continue
   375	
   376	        // Skip AI notes - they're displayed in a separate section
   377	        if (AI_NOTES_KEYS.has(key)) continue
   378	
   379	        // Skip _raw_* fields and internal fields
   380	        if (key.startsWith('_raw_') || key.startsWith('_')) continue
   381	
   382	        // Skip width/height individually if we're showing combined resolution
   383	        if (hasResolution && (key === 'width' || key === 'height')) continue
   384	
   385	        const category = getParamCategory(key)
   386	        const isFromAi = aiFields.includes(key)
   387	
   388	        // Skip unknown fields from AI extraction - they belong to AI Insights, NOT Custom Parameters!
   389	        // Custom category is ONLY for user-defined parameters, not AI-extracted unknown fields.
   390	        // User-added custom fields (not in _ai_fields) go to Custom.
   391	        if (isFromAi && category === 'custom') continue
   392	
   393	        const formatted = formatParamValue(key, value, t)
   394	
   395	        if (formatted) {
   396	          result[category].push({
   397	            key,
   398	            value: formatted,
   399	            highlight: HIGHLIGHT_PARAMS.has(key),
   400	          })
   401	        }
   402	      }
   403	
   404	      // Add combined resolution
   405	      if (hasResolution) {
   406	        result.resolution.push({
   407	          key: 'resolution',
   408	          value: `${parameters.width}×${parameters.height}`,
   409	          highlight: false,
   410	        })
   411	      }
   412	    }
   413	
   414	    return result
   415	  }, [parameters, modelInfo, t])
   416	
   417	  // Helper to format AI note values nicely
   418	  const formatNoteValue = useCallback((value: unknown): string => {
   419	    if (value === null || value === undefined) return ''
   420	
   421	    // Handle arrays
   422	    if (Array.isArray(value)) {
   423	      // Check if array contains objects
   424	      if (value.length > 0 && typeof value[0] === 'object' && value[0] !== null) {
   425	        // Format each object nicely
   426	        return value.map(item => {
   427	          if (typeof item === 'object' && item !== null) {
   428	            // Extract key values from object, handling nested values
   429	            return Object.entries(item)
   430	              .map(([k, v]) => `${k}: ${formatAnyValueRecursive(v)}`)
   431	              .join(', ')
   432	          }
   433	          return String(item)
   434	        }).join(' • ')
   435	      }
   436	      // Simple array - join with bullet
   437	      return value.map(item => formatAnyValueRecursive(item)).join(' • ')
   438	    }
   439	
   440	    // Handle objects
   441	    if (typeof value === 'object' && value !== null) {
   442	      return Object.entries(value)
   443	        .map(([k, v]) => `${k}: ${formatAnyValueRecursive(v)}`)
   444	        .join(', ')
   445	    }
   446	
   447	    return String(value)
   448	  }, [])
   449	
   450	  // Extract AI notes (text-based metadata from AI extraction)
   451	  // Includes:
   452	  // - AI_NOTES_KEYS (explicit AI note fields)
   453	  // - _raw_* fields (unnormalized data that couldn't be parsed)
   454	  // - Unknown category fields when AI-extracted (not user custom params)
   455	  const aiNotes = useMemo(() => {
   456	    if (!parameters) return []
   457	
   458	    const notes: Array<{ key: string; label: string; value: string; isWarning?: boolean; isRaw?: boolean; isList?: boolean; isUnknown?: boolean }> = []
   459	    // Get list of fields that came from AI extraction (to distinguish from user custom fields)
   460	    const aiFields = (parameters._ai_fields as string[] | undefined) ?? []
   461	
   462	    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(parameters)) {
   463	      if (value === null || value === undefined) continue
   464	      if (key === '_extracted_by' || key === '_ai_fields') continue
   465	
   466	      // Check field type
   467	      const isAiNote = AI_NOTES_KEYS.has(key)
   468	      const isRawField = key.startsWith('_raw_')
   469	      const isInternalField = key.startsWith('_')
   470	      const category = getParamCategory(key)
   471	      // Unknown fields from AI extraction go to AI Insights (not Custom Parameters)
   472	      // Only include if field is in _ai_fields list (came from AI, not user-added)
   473	      const isFromAi = aiFields.includes(key)
   474	      const isUnknownFromAi = isFromAi && category === 'custom' && !isInternalField
   475	
   476	      // Include: explicit AI notes, raw fields, or unknown fields from AI
   477	      if (!isAiNote && !isRawField && !isUnknownFromAi) continue
   478	
   479	      const displayValue = formatNoteValue(value)
   480	      const isList = Array.isArray(value) && value.length > 1
   481	
   482	      if (displayValue.trim()) {
   483	        // Determine label based on field type
   484	        let label: string
   485	        if (isRawField) {
   486	          const fieldName = key.replace('_raw_', '')
   487	          label = getParamLabel(fieldName, t) + ` ${t('pack.parameters.raw')}`
   488	        } else if (isUnknownFromAi) {
   489	          // AI-extracted unknown field - nice label
   490	          label = AI_NOTES_LABELS[key] || key.replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase())
   491	        } else {
   492	          label = AI_NOTES_LABELS[key] || key.replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase())
   493	        }
   494	
   495	        notes.push({
   496	          key,
   497	          label,
   498	          value: displayValue,
   499	          isWarning: key === 'warnings' || key.includes('warning') || key.includes('avoid'),
   500	          isRaw: isRawField,
   501	          isList,
   502	          isUnknown: isUnknownFromAi,
   503	        })
   504	      }
   505	    }
   506	
   507	    return notes
   508	  }, [parameters, formatNoteValue, t])
   509	
   510	  // Check if any parameters exist
   511	  const hasParameters = Object.values(categorizedParams).some(arr => arr.length > 0)
   512	
   513	  // Categories to show in order
   514	  const categoryOrder: CategoryKey[] = [
   515	    'generation', 'resolution', 'hires', 'model', 'controlnet',
   516	    'inpainting', 'batch', 'advanced', 'sdxl', 'freeu', 'ipadapter', 'custom'
   517	  ]
   518	
   519	  return (
   520	    <div
   521	      className={ANIMATION_PRESETS.sectionEnter}
   522	      style={{ animationDelay: `${animationDelay}ms`, animationFillMode: 'both' }}
   523	    >
   524	      <Card className="p-4">
   525	        {/* Header */}
   526	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
   527	          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   528	            <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-synapse flex items-center gap-2">
   529	              <Sliders className="w-4 h-4" />
   530	              {t('pack.parameters.generationSettings')}
   531	            </h3>
   532	            {/* Extracted by indicator */}
   533	            {parameters?._extracted_by && (
   534	              <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs bg-slate-dark/50 text-text-muted border border-slate-mid/30">
   535	                <Bot className="w-3 h-3" />
   536	                {parameters._extracted_by}
   537	              </span>
   538	            )}
   539	          </div>
   540	          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   541	            {/* Collapse/Expand button */}
   542	            <button
   543	              onClick={() => setIsCollapsed(!isCollapsed)}
   544	              className={clsx(
   545	                'flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg',
   546	                'text-xs text-text-muted',
   547	                'bg-slate-mid/30 hover:bg-slate-mid/50',
   548	                'transition-colors duration-200'
   549	              )}
   550	              title={isCollapsed ? t('pack.parameters.expandSettings') : t('pack.parameters.collapseSettings')}
   551	            >
   552	              {isCollapsed ? (
   553	                <>
   554	                  <Maximize2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
   555	                  {t('pack.gallery.expand')}
   556	                </>
   557	              ) : (
   558	                <>
   559	                  <Minimize2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
   560	                  {t('pack.gallery.collapse')}
   561	                </>
   562	              )}
   563	            </button>
   564	            <button
   565	              onClick={onEdit}
   566	              className={clsx(
   567	                'flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg',
   568	                'text-xs text-synapse',
   569	                'bg-synapse/10 hover:bg-synapse/20',
   570	                'transition-colors duration-200'

     1	/**
     2	 * AI Services React Hooks
     3	 */
     4	
     5	import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     6	import {
     7	  getCacheStats,
     8	  clearCache,
     9	  cleanupCache,
    10	} from './api'
    11	
    12	/**
    13	 * Query key factory for AI services
    14	 */
    15	export const aiKeys = {
    16	  all: ['ai'] as const,
    17	  cacheStats: () => [...aiKeys.all, 'cache', 'stats'] as const,
    18	}
    19	
    20	/**
    21	 * Hook to get cache statistics
    22	 */
    23	export function useAICacheStats() {
    24	  return useQuery({
    25	    queryKey: aiKeys.cacheStats(),
    26	    queryFn: getCacheStats,
    27	    staleTime: 30_000,
    28	  })
    29	}
    30	
    31	/**
    32	 * Hook to clear cache
    33	 */
    34	export function useClearAICache() {
    35	  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    36	
    37	  return useMutation({
    38	    mutationFn: clearCache,
    39	    onSuccess: () => {
    40	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: aiKeys.cacheStats() })
    41	    },
    42	  })
    43	}
    44	
    45	/**
    46	 * Hook to cleanup expired cache
    47	 */
    48	export function useCleanupAICache() {
    49	  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    50	
    51	  return useMutation({
    52	    mutationFn: cleanupCache,
    53	    onSuccess: () => {
    54	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: aiKeys.cacheStats() })
    55	    },
    56	  })
    57	}

codex
The implemented UI has a real AI settings panel and optional Avatar widget mount. I’m now checking whether feature-level “requires AI” badges exist outside that settings flow, because the backend fallbacks and the UI affordances are not the same thing.

   615	                <Lightbulb className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-400" />
   616	              </div>

   618	            </div>
   619	
   620	            <div className="space-y-3">
   621	              {aiNotes.map(({ key, label, value, isWarning, isRaw, isList }) => {
   622	                // Determine icon and colors based on content
   623	                const isTip = key.includes('tip') || key.includes('best') || key.includes('usage')
   624	                const isResolution = key.includes('resolution')
   625	                const isAvoid = key.includes('avoid')
   626	                const isCompat = key.includes('compat')
   627	                const isQuality = key.includes('quality') || key.includes('style')
   628	
   629	                // Get appropriate icon
   630	                const IconComponent = isWarning || isAvoid ? AlertTriangle
   631	                  : isRaw ? FileText
   632	                  : isTip ? CheckCircle2
   633	                  : isCompat ? Info
   634	                  : isQuality ? Sparkles
   635	                  : isResolution ? Grid3X3
   636	                  : Info
   637	
   638	                // Get colors - more subtle
   639	                const iconColor = isWarning || isAvoid ? 'text-amber-400'
   640	                  : isRaw ? 'text-purple-400'
   641	                  : isTip ? 'text-emerald-400'
   642	                  : 'text-slate-400'
   643	
   644	                const bgColor = isWarning || isAvoid ? 'bg-amber-500/5'
   645	                  : isRaw ? 'bg-purple-500/5'
   646	                  : isTip ? 'bg-emerald-500/5'
   647	                  : 'bg-slate-800/30'
   648	
   649	                // Split tips/text by bullet separator, newline, comma, or sentence for bullet points
   650	                const shouldSplitAsBullets = isTip && (value.includes(' • ') || value.includes('\n') || value.includes(',') || value.includes('.'))
   651	                const bulletItems = shouldSplitAsBullets
   652	                  ? value.split(/ • |[\n,.]/).map(s => s.trim()).filter(s => s.length > 3)
   653	                  : null
   654	
   655	                // Split list values for tags
   656	                const listItems = isList && !shouldSplitAsBullets ? value.split(' • ') : null
   657	
   658	                return (
   659	                  <div
   660	                    key={key}
   661	                    className={clsx(
   662	                      "rounded-xl p-3 transition-all duration-200",
   663	                      bgColor,
   664	                      "border border-slate-mid/10 hover:border-slate-mid/30"
   665	                    )}
   666	                  >
   667	                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   668	                      <IconComponent className={clsx("w-4 h-4 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5", iconColor)} />
   669	                      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   670	                        <div className={clsx(
   671	                          "text-xs font-medium mb-1.5 uppercase tracking-wide",
   672	                          isWarning || isAvoid ? "text-amber-400/80" : "text-slate-500"
   673	                        )}>
   674	                          {label}
   675	                        </div>
   676	                        {bulletItems ? (
   677	                          // Render as bullet list for tips
   678	                          <ul className="space-y-1">
   679	                            {bulletItems.map((item, i) => (
   680	                              <li
   681	                                key={i}
   682	                                className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-300/90 leading-relaxed"
   683	                              >
   684	                                <span className="text-emerald-400/60 text-lg leading-none">•</span>

   686	                              </li>

   969	// =============================================================================
   970	// Main Component
   971	// =============================================================================
   972	
   973	export function EditParametersModal({
   974	  isOpen,
   975	  initialParameters,
   976	  onSave,
   977	  onClose,
   978	  isSaving = false,
   979	}: EditParametersModalProps) {
   980	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   981	  const [parameters, setParameters] = useState<Record<string, string>>(initialParameters)
   982	  const [customTypes, setCustomTypes] = useState<Map<string, ParamType>>(new Map())
   983	  const [customCategories, setCustomCategories] = useState<Map<string, CategoryKey>>(new Map())
   984	  const [activeSections, setActiveSections] = useState<Set<CategoryKey>>(new Set())
   985	  const [newKey, setNewKey] = useState('')
   986	  const [newValue, setNewValue] = useState('')
   987	  const [newType, setNewType] = useState<ParamType>('string')
   988	  const [newCategory, setNewCategory] = useState<CategoryKey>('custom')
   989	
   990	  // Reset when modal opens
   991	  // IMPORTANT: Filter out AI-extracted fields - they are read-only in AI Insights section
   992	  useEffect(() => {
   993	    if (isOpen) {
   994	      const stringified: Record<string, string> = {}
   995	      // Get list of AI-extracted field names (not user-added custom fields)
   996	      const aiFields = (initialParameters._ai_fields as unknown as string[] | undefined) ?? []
   997	
   998	      for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(initialParameters)) {
   999	        // Skip internal fields (start with _)
  1000	        if (key.startsWith('_')) continue
  1001	
  1002	        // Skip AI-extracted unknown fields - they belong to AI Insights, not editable params
  1003	        // BUT keep user-added custom fields (they're NOT in _ai_fields array)
  1004	        const isAiField = aiFields.includes(key)
  1005	        const isKnownParam = Boolean(getParamDef(key))
  1006	        if (isAiField && !isKnownParam) continue
  1007	
  1008	        stringified[key] = String(value ?? '')
  1009	      }
  1010	      setParameters(stringified)
  1011	      setCustomTypes(new Map())
  1012	      setCustomCategories(new Map())
  1013	      setActiveSections(new Set())
  1014	      setNewKey('')
  1015	      setNewValue('')
  1016	      setNewType('string')
  1017	      setNewCategory('custom')
  1018	    }
  1019	  }, [isOpen, initialParameters])
  1020	
  1021	  // Categorize parameters
  1022	  const categorizedParams = useMemo(() => {
  1023	    const entries = Object.entries(parameters)
  1024	    const result: Record<CategoryKey, [string, string][]> = {
  1025	      generation: [],
  1026	      resolution: [],
  1027	      hires: [],
  1028	      model: [],
  1029	      controlnet: [],
  1030	      inpainting: [],

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * AI Services API Client
     3	 */
     4	
     5	import type {
     6	  AIExtractionResponse,
     7	  AICacheStats,
     8	} from './types'
     9	
    10	const API_BASE = '/api/ai'
    11	
    12	/**
    13	 * Extract parameters from description using AI
    14	 */
    15	export async function extractParameters(
    16	  description: string,
    17	  useCache = true
    18	): Promise<AIExtractionResponse> {
    19	  const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/extract`, {
    20	    method: 'POST',
    21	    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    22	    body: JSON.stringify({ description, use_cache: useCache }),
    23	  })
    24	  if (!response.ok) {
    25	    throw new Error(`Failed to extract parameters: ${response.statusText}`)
    26	  }
    27	  return response.json()
    28	}
    29	
    30	/**
    31	 * Get cache statistics
    32	 */
    33	export async function getCacheStats(): Promise<AICacheStats> {
    34	  const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/cache/stats`)
    35	  if (!response.ok) {
    36	    throw new Error(`Failed to get cache stats: ${response.statusText}`)
    37	  }
    38	  return response.json()
    39	}
    40	
    41	/**
    42	 * Clear all cache entries
    43	 */
    44	export async function clearCache(): Promise<{ cleared: number }> {
    45	  const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/cache`, {
    46	    method: 'DELETE',
    47	  })
    48	  if (!response.ok) {
    49	    throw new Error(`Failed to clear cache: ${response.statusText}`)
    50	  }
    51	  return response.json()
    52	}
    53	
    54	/**
    55	 * Cleanup expired cache entries
    56	 */
    57	export async function cleanupCache(): Promise<{ cleaned: number }> {
    58	  const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/cache/cleanup`, {
    59	    method: 'POST',
    60	  })
    61	  if (!response.ok) {
    62	    throw new Error(`Failed to cleanup cache: ${response.statusText}`)
    63	  }
    64	  return response.json()
    65	}

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * PackWorkflowsSection
     3	 *
     4	 * Displays ComfyUI workflows with symlink management.
     5	 *
     6	 * FUNKCE ZACHOVÁNY:
     7	 * - Workflow list with name, filename, description
     8	 * - Symlink status (In ComfyUI / Broken link badges)
     9	 * - is_default badge
    10	 * - Link/Unlink to ComfyUI
    11	 * - Download workflow JSON
    12	 * - Delete workflow
    13	 * - Upload workflow button
    14	 * - Generate Default workflow button
    15	 *
    16	 * VIZUÁLNĚ VYLEPŠENO:
    17	 * - Premium card design
    18	 * - Hover efekty
    19	 * - Lepší status badges
    20	 * - Staggered animace
    21	 */
    22	
    23	import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
    24	import { FileJson, Check, AlertTriangle, FolderOpen, X, Download, Trash2, Loader2, Play, Upload } from 'lucide-react'
    25	import { clsx } from 'clsx'
    26	import { Card } from '@/components/ui/Card'
    27	import { Button } from '@/components/ui/Button'
    28	import type { WorkflowInfo } from '../types'
    29	import { ANIMATION_PRESETS } from '../constants'
    30	
    31	// =============================================================================
    32	// Types
    33	// =============================================================================
    34	
    35	export interface PackWorkflowsSectionProps {
    36	  /**
    37	   * Workflows to display
    38	   */
    39	  workflows: WorkflowInfo[]
    40	
    41	  /**
    42	   * Pack name for API calls
    43	   */
    44	  packName: string
    45	
    46	  /**
    47	   * Whether base model is needed (disables generate)
    48	   */
    49	  needsBaseModel?: boolean
    50	
    51	  /**
    52	   * Handlers
    53	   */
    54	  onCreateSymlink: (filename: string) => void
    55	  onRemoveSymlink: (filename: string) => void
    56	  onDeleteWorkflow: (filename: string) => void
    57	  onGenerateWorkflow: () => void
    58	  onOpenUploadModal: () => void
    59	
    60	  /**
    61	   * Loading states
    62	   */
    63	  isCreateSymlinkPending?: boolean
    64	  isRemoveSymlinkPending?: boolean
    65	  isDeletePending?: boolean
    66	  isGeneratePending?: boolean
    67	
    68	  /**
    69	   * Animation delay
    70	   */
    71	  animationDelay?: number
    72	}
    73	
    74	// =============================================================================
    75	// Sub-components
    76	// =============================================================================
    77	
    78	interface WorkflowCardProps {
    79	  workflow: WorkflowInfo
    80	  packName: string
    81	  onCreateSymlink: (filename: string) => void
    82	  onRemoveSymlink: (filename: string) => void
    83	  onDeleteWorkflow: (filename: string) => void
    84	  isCreateSymlinkPending?: boolean
    85	  isRemoveSymlinkPending?: boolean
    86	  isDeletePending?: boolean
    87	}
    88	
    89	function WorkflowCard({
    90	  workflow,
    91	  packName,
    92	  onCreateSymlink,
    93	  onRemoveSymlink,
    94	  onDeleteWorkflow,
    95	  isCreateSymlinkPending,
    96	  isRemoveSymlinkPending,
    97	  isDeletePending,
    98	}: WorkflowCardProps) {
    99	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   100	  const hasSymlink = workflow.has_symlink || false
   101	  const symlinkValid = workflow.symlink_valid || false
   102	
   103	  return (
   104	    <div
   105	      className={clsx(
   106	        "flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-xl border",
   107	        "transition-all duration-200",
   108	        hasSymlink && symlinkValid
   109	          ? "bg-green-500/10 border-green-500/30 hover:border-green-500/50"
   110	          : "bg-slate-dark border-slate-mid/30 hover:border-slate-mid/50",
   111	        "hover:shadow-lg"
   112	      )}
   113	    >
   114	      {/* Left: Workflow Info */}
   115	      <div className="flex items-center gap-3 min-w-0 flex-1">
   116	        <FileJson className={clsx(
   117	          "w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0",
   118	          hasSymlink && symlinkValid ? "text-green-400" : "text-synapse"
   119	        )} />
   120	        <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
   121	          <p className="text-text-primary font-medium truncate">{workflow.name}</p>
   122	          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-text-muted flex-wrap">
   123	            <span className="font-mono truncate max-w-[200px]">{workflow.filename}</span>
   124	            {workflow.is_default && (
   125	              <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-synapse/20 text-synapse rounded text-xs">
   126	                {t('pack.workflows.default')}
   127	              </span>
   128	            )}
   129	            {hasSymlink && symlinkValid && (
   130	              <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 rounded flex items-center gap-1">
   131	                <Check className="w-3 h-3" />
   132	                {t('pack.workflows.status.linked')}
   133	              </span>
   134	            )}
   135	            {hasSymlink && !symlinkValid && (
   136	              <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-orange-500/20 text-orange-400 rounded flex items-center gap-1">
   137	                <AlertTriangle className="w-3 h-3" />
   138	                {t('pack.workflows.status.broken')}
   139	              </span>
   140	            )}
   141	          </div>
   142	          {/* Local path */}
   143	          {workflow.local_path && (
   144	            <p className="text-xs text-text-muted mt-1 font-mono truncate" title={workflow.local_path}>
   145	              {workflow.local_path}
   146	            </p>
   147	          )}
   148	          {workflow.description && (
   149	            <p className="text-xs text-text-muted mt-1 line-clamp-2">{workflow.description}</p>
   150	          )}
   151	        </div>
   152	      </div>
   153	
   154	      {/* Right: Actions */}
   155	      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-shrink-0 ml-3">
   156	        {/* Link/Unlink to ComfyUI */}
   157	        {hasSymlink ? (
   158	          <button
   159	            onClick={() => {
   160	              if (confirm(t('pack.workflows.confirmUnlink'))) {
   161	                onRemoveSymlink(workflow.filename)
   162	              }
   163	            }}
   164	            disabled={isRemoveSymlinkPending}
   165	            className={clsx(
   166	              "px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-sm",
   167	              "bg-slate-mid/50 text-text-secondary",
   168	              "hover:bg-slate-mid transition-all duration-200",
   169	              "flex items-center gap-1.5"
   170	            )}
   171	            title={t('pack.workflows.unlink')}
   172	          >
   173	            {isRemoveSymlinkPending ? (
   174	              <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   175	            ) : (
   176	              <X className="w-4 h-4" />
   177	            )}
   178	            {t('pack.workflows.unlink')}
   179	          </button>
   180	        ) : (
   181	          <button
   182	            onClick={() => onCreateSymlink(workflow.filename)}
   183	            disabled={isCreateSymlinkPending}
   184	            className={clsx(
   185	              "px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-sm",
   186	              "bg-synapse/20 text-synapse",
   187	              "hover:bg-synapse/30 transition-all duration-200",
   188	              "flex items-center gap-1.5"
   189	            )}
   190	            title={t('pack.workflows.link')}
   191	          >
   192	            {isCreateSymlinkPending ? (
   193	              <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   194	            ) : (
   195	              <FolderOpen className="w-4 h-4" />
   196	            )}
   197	            {t('pack.workflows.link')}
   198	          </button>
   199	        )}
   200	
   201	        {/* Download workflow JSON */}
   202	        <button
   203	          onClick={() => {
   204	            window.open(`/api/packs/${encodeURIComponent(packName)}/workflow/${encodeURIComponent(workflow.filename)}`, '_blank')
   205	          }}
   206	          className={clsx(
   207	            "p-1.5 rounded-lg",
   208	            "bg-slate-mid/50 text-text-secondary",
   209	            "hover:bg-slate-mid hover:text-synapse",
   210	            "transition-all duration-200"
   211	          )}
   212	          title={t('pack.workflows.downloadJson')}
   213	        >
   214	          <Download className="w-4 h-4" />
   215	        </button>
   216	
   217	        {/* Delete workflow */}
   218	        <button
   219	          onClick={() => {
   220	            if (confirm(t('pack.workflows.confirmDelete', { name: workflow.name }))) {
   221	              onDeleteWorkflow(workflow.filename)
   222	            }
   223	          }}
   224	          disabled={isDeletePending}
   225	          className={clsx(
   226	            "p-1.5 rounded-lg",
   227	            "bg-red-500/20 text-red-400",
   228	            "hover:bg-red-500/30",
   229	            "transition-all duration-200"
   230	          )}
   231	          title={t('pack.workflows.deleteWorkflow')}
   232	        >
   233	          {isDeletePending ? (
   234	            <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   235	          ) : (
   236	            <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
   237	          )}
   238	        </button>
   239	      </div>
   240	    </div>
   241	  )
   242	}
   243	
   244	// =============================================================================
   245	// Main Component
   246	// =============================================================================
   247	
   248	export function PackWorkflowsSection({
   249	  workflows,
   250	  packName,
   251	  needsBaseModel = false,
   252	  onCreateSymlink,
   253	  onRemoveSymlink,
   254	  onDeleteWorkflow,
   255	  onGenerateWorkflow,
   256	  onOpenUploadModal,
   257	  isCreateSymlinkPending,
   258	  isRemoveSymlinkPending,
   259	  isDeletePending,
   260	  isGeneratePending,
   261	  animationDelay = 0,
   262	}: PackWorkflowsSectionProps) {
   263	  const { t } = useTranslation()
   264	
   265	  return (
   266	    <div
   267	      className={ANIMATION_PRESETS.sectionEnter}
   268	      style={{ animationDelay: `${animationDelay}ms`, animationFillMode: 'both' }}
   269	    >
   270	      <Card className="p-4">
   271	        {/* Header */}
   272	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
   273	        <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-text-primary flex items-center gap-2">
   274	          <FileJson className="w-4 h-4 text-synapse" />
   275	          {t('pack.workflows.comfyuiWorkflows')}
   276	          <span className="text-text-muted font-normal">({workflows?.length || 0})</span>
   277	        </h3>
   278	
   279	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   280	          {/* Upload button */}
   281	          <Button
   282	            size="sm"
   283	            variant="secondary"
   284	            onClick={onOpenUploadModal}
   285	            className="transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-105"
   286	          >
   287	            <Upload className="w-4 h-4" />
   288	            {t('pack.workflows.upload')}
   289	          </Button>
   290	
   291	          {/* Generate Default button */}
   292	          <div className="relative group">
   293	            <Button
   294	              size="sm"
   295	              variant="primary"
   296	              disabled={needsBaseModel || isGeneratePending}
   297	              onClick={onGenerateWorkflow}
   298	              className={clsx(
   299	                "transition-all duration-200",
   300	                !needsBaseModel && !isGeneratePending && "hover:scale-105",
   301	                needsBaseModel && "opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed"
   302	              )}
   303	            >
   304	              {isGeneratePending ? (
   305	                <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
   306	              ) : (
   307	                <Play className="w-4 h-4" />
   308	              )}
   309	              {t('pack.workflows.generate')}
   310	            </Button>
   311	            {needsBaseModel && (
   312	              <div className={clsx(
   313	                "absolute bottom-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 mb-2",
   314	                "px-3 py-2 rounded-lg",
   315	                "bg-slate-dark border border-amber-500/50",
   316	                "text-xs text-amber-400 whitespace-nowrap",
   317	                "opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100",
   318	                "transition-opacity pointer-events-none",
   319	                "z-10"
   320	              )}>
   321	                {t('pack.workflows.resolveFirst')}
   322	              </div>
   323	            )}
   324	          </div>
   325	        </div>
   326	      </div>
   327	
   328	      {/* Workflows List */}
   329	      {workflows?.length > 0 ? (
   330	        <div className="space-y-2">
   331	          {workflows.map((workflow, idx) => (
   332	            <WorkflowCard
   333	              key={idx}
   334	              workflow={workflow}
   335	              packName={packName}
   336	              onCreateSymlink={onCreateSymlink}
   337	              onRemoveSymlink={onRemoveSymlink}
   338	              onDeleteWorkflow={onDeleteWorkflow}
   339	              isCreateSymlinkPending={isCreateSymlinkPending}
   340	              isRemoveSymlinkPending={isRemoveSymlinkPending}
   341	              isDeletePending={isDeletePending}
   342	            />
   343	          ))}
   344	        </div>
   345	      ) : (
   346	        <div className="text-center py-8 text-text-muted">
   347	          <FileJson className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-3 opacity-50" />
   348	          <p className="text-sm">{t('pack.workflows.noWorkflows')}</p>
   349	          <p className="text-xs mt-1">
   350	            {t('pack.workflows.emptyHint')}
   351	          </p>
   352	        </div>
   353	      )}
   354	      </Card>
   355	    </div>
   356	  )
   357	}
   358	
   359	export default PackWorkflowsSection

  4111

  4123	            description="Auto-generated default workflow based on pack parameters",
  4124	            is_default=True,
  4125	        )

  4127	        # Remove existing default workflows

  4151	def _detect_architecture(pack) -> str:
  4152	    """Detect architecture from pack's base model."""
  4153	    BASE_MODEL_ARCHITECTURE = {
  4154	        "SD 1.5": "sd15",
  4155	        "SD 1.4": "sd15",
  4156	        "SD 2.0": "sd20",
  4157	        "SD 2.1": "sd21",
  4158	        "SDXL 1.0": "sdxl",
  4159	        "SDXL": "sdxl",
  4160	        "SDXL Turbo": "sdxl",
  4161	        "SDXL Lightning": "sdxl",
  4162	        "Pony": "sdxl",
  4163	        "Illustrious": "sdxl",
  4164	        "NoobAI": "sdxl",
  4165	        "Flux.1 D": "flux",
  4166	        "Flux.1 S": "flux",
  4167	        "Flux": "flux",
  4168	        "AuraFlow": "auraflow",
  4169	    }
  4170	    
  4171	    # Check pack.base_model first
  4172	    if pack.base_model:
  4173	        for key, arch in BASE_MODEL_ARCHITECTURE.items():
  4174	            if key.lower() in pack.base_model.lower():
  4175	                return arch
  4176	    
  4177	    # Check model_info.base_model
  4178	    if pack.model_info and pack.model_info.base_model:
  4179	        for key, arch in BASE_MODEL_ARCHITECTURE.items():
  4180	            if key.lower() in pack.model_info.base_model.lower():
  4181	                return arch
  4182	    
  4183	    # Check dependency selectors for base_model
  4184	    for dep in pack.dependencies:
  4185	        if dep.selector and dep.selector.base_model:
  4186	            for key, arch in BASE_MODEL_ARCHITECTURE.items():
  4187	                if key.lower() in dep.selector.base_model.lower():
  4188	                    return arch
  4189	    
  4190	    return "sd15"

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	"""
     2	Synapse Store MCP Server — Tools for AI avatar.
     3	
     4	Provides 21 tools for querying packs, inventory, backup status,
     5	storage statistics, Civitai interaction, workflow analysis, and
     6	dependency resolution. Uses FastMCP with stdio transport.
     7	
     8	All tool implementations are in _*_impl() functions for testability
     9	without requiring the mcp package.
    10	
    11	Tool groups:
    12	  - Store (10): list_packs, get_pack_details, search_packs, get_pack_parameters,
    13	    get_inventory_summary, find_orphan_blobs, find_missing_blobs, get_backup_status,
    14	    check_pack_updates, get_storage_stats
    15	  - Civitai (4): search_civitai, analyze_civitai_model, compare_model_versions,
    16	    import_civitai_model
    17	  - Workflow (4): scan_workflow, scan_workflow_file, check_workflow_availability,
    18	    list_custom_nodes
    19	  - Dependencies (3): resolve_workflow_dependencies, find_model_by_hash,
    20	    suggest_asset_sources
    21	"""
    22	
    23	from __future__ import annotations
    24	
    25	import json
    26	import logging
    27	import threading
    28	from pathlib import Path
    29	from typing import Any, Optional
    30	
    31	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    32	
    33	# Guard MCP import — module is usable without mcp installed (for tests)
    34	try:
    35	    from mcp.server.fastmcp import FastMCP
    36	
    37	    MCP_AVAILABLE = True
    38	except ImportError:
    39	    MCP_AVAILABLE = False
    40	
    41	# Lazy Store singleton (thread-safe)
    42	_store_instance = None
    43	_store_lock = threading.Lock()
    44	
    45	
    46	def _log_tool_call(tool_name: str, **kwargs: Any) -> None:
    47	    """Log MCP tool invocation at DEBUG level."""
    48	    args = ", ".join(f"{k}={v!r}" for k, v in kwargs.items() if v)
    49	    logger.debug("[mcp] %s(%s)", tool_name, args)
    50	
    51	
    52	def _get_store() -> Any:
    53	    """Get or create Store singleton (same pattern as src/store/api.py)."""
    54	    global _store_instance
    55	    if _store_instance is None:
    56	        with _store_lock:
    57	            if _store_instance is None:
    58	                from src.store import Store
    59	                from config.settings import get_config
    60	
    61	                cfg = get_config()
    62	                civitai_api_key = None
    63	                if hasattr(cfg, "api") and hasattr(cfg.api, "civitai_token"):
    64	                    civitai_api_key = cfg.api.civitai_token
    65	
    66	                _store_instance = Store(root=cfg.store.root, civitai_api_key=civitai_api_key)
    67	                logger.info(
    68	                    "[mcp] Store initialized: root=%s, civitai_token=%s",
    69	                    cfg.store.root,
    70	                    "set" if civitai_api_key else "not set",
    71	                )
    72	    return _store_instance
    73	
    74	
    75	def _reset_store() -> None:
    76	    """Reset Store singleton (for testing)."""
    77	    global _store_instance
    78	    with _store_lock:
    79	        _store_instance = None
    80	
    81	
    82	def _format_size(size_bytes: int) -> str:
    83	    """Format bytes into human-readable size."""
    84	    if size_bytes < 1024:
    85	        return f"{size_bytes} B"
    86	    elif size_bytes < 1024 * 1024:
    87	        return f"{size_bytes / 1024:.1f} KB"
    88	    elif size_bytes < 1024 * 1024 * 1024:
    89	        return f"{size_bytes / (1024 * 1024):.1f} MB"
    90	    else:
    91	        return f"{size_bytes / (1024 * 1024 * 1024):.2f} GB"
    92	
    93	
    94	# =============================================================================
    95	# Tool implementations (_impl functions for testability)
    96	# =============================================================================
    97	
    98	
    99	_MAX_LIMIT = 100
   100	
   101	
   102	def _list_packs_impl(store: Any = None, name_filter: str = "", limit: int = 20) -> str:
   103	    """List all packs in the Synapse store."""
   104	    try:
   105	        if store is None:
   106	            store = _get_store()
   107	
   108	        limit = max(1, min(limit, _MAX_LIMIT))
   109	        pack_names = store.list_packs()
   110	
   111	        # Apply filter
   112	        if name_filter:
   113	            filter_lower = name_filter.lower()
   114	            pack_names = [n for n in pack_names if filter_lower in n.lower()]
   115	
   116	        # Apply limit
   117	        total = len(pack_names)
   118	        pack_names = pack_names[:limit]
   119	
   120	        if not pack_names:
   121	            if name_filter:
   122	                return f"No packs found matching '{name_filter}'."
   123	            return "No packs in the store."
   124	
   125	        lines = [f"Found {total} pack{'s' if total != 1 else ''}:"]
   126	        if total > limit:
   127	            lines[0] += f" (showing first {limit})"
   128	        lines.append("")
   129	
   130	        for i, name in enumerate(pack_names, 1):
   131	            try:
   132	                pack = store.get_pack(name)
   133	                pack_type = pack.pack_type.value if hasattr(pack.pack_type, "value") else str(pack.pack_type)
   134	                base = f" — Base: {pack.base_model}" if pack.base_model else ""
   135	                dep_count = len(pack.dependencies)
   136	                source = pack.source.provider.value if pack.source else "unknown"
   137	                lines.append(
   138	                    f"{i}. {name} ({pack_type}){base}"
   139	                )
   140	                lines.append(

  1210	
  1211	if MCP_AVAILABLE:
  1212	    mcp = FastMCP("synapse-store")
  1213	
  1214	    @mcp.tool()
  1215	    def list_packs(name_filter: str = "", limit: int = 20) -> str:
  1216	        """List all packs in the Synapse store. Optionally filter by name and limit results."""
  1217	        _log_tool_call("list_packs", name_filter=name_filter, limit=limit)
  1218	        return _list_packs_impl(name_filter=name_filter, limit=limit)
  1219	
  1220	    @mcp.tool()
  1221	    def get_pack_details(pack_name: str) -> str:
  1222	        """Get detailed information about a specific pack including dependencies and parameters."""
  1223	        _log_tool_call("get_pack_details", pack_name=pack_name)
  1224	        return _get_pack_details_impl(pack_name=pack_name)
  1225	
  1226	    @mcp.tool()
  1227	    def search_packs(query: str) -> str:
  1228	        """Search packs by name or dependency ID."""
  1229	        _log_tool_call("search_packs", query=query)
  1230	        return _search_packs_impl(query=query)
  1231	
  1232	    @mcp.tool()

   102	def _list_packs_impl(store: Any = None, name_filter: str = "", limit: int = 20) -> str:
   103	    """List all packs in the Synapse store."""
   104	    try:
   105	        if store is None:
   106	            store = _get_store()
   107	
   108	        limit = max(1, min(limit, _MAX_LIMIT))
   109	        pack_names = store.list_packs()
   110	
   111	        # Apply filter
   112	        if name_filter:
   113	            filter_lower = name_filter.lower()
   114	            pack_names = [n for n in pack_names if filter_lower in n.lower()]
   115	
   116	        # Apply limit
   117	        total = len(pack_names)
   118	        pack_names = pack_names[:limit]
   119	
   120	        if not pack_names:
   121	            if name_filter:
   122	                return f"No packs found matching '{name_filter}'."
   123	            return "No packs in the store."
   124	
   125	        lines = [f"Found {total} pack{'s' if total != 1 else ''}:"]
   126	        if total > limit:
   127	            lines[0] += f" (showing first {limit})"
   128	        lines.append("")
   129	
   130	        for i, name in enumerate(pack_names, 1):
   131	            try:
   132	                pack = store.get_pack(name)
   133	                pack_type = pack.pack_type.value if hasattr(pack.pack_type, "value") else str(pack.pack_type)
   134	                base = f" — Base: {pack.base_model}" if pack.base_model else ""
   135	                dep_count = len(pack.dependencies)
   136	                source = pack.source.provider.value if pack.source else "unknown"
   137	                lines.append(
   138	                    f"{i}. {name} ({pack_type}){base}"
   139	                )
   140	                lines.append(
   141	                    f"   {dep_count} dependenc{'y' if dep_count == 1 else 'ies'}, Source: {source}"
   142	                )
   143	            except Exception as e:
   144	                logger.debug("Failed to load pack '%s': %s", name, e)
   145	                lines.append(f"{i}. {name} (error loading details)")
   146	
   147	        return "\n".join(lines)
   148	    except Exception as e:
   149	        logger.error("list_packs failed: %s", e, exc_info=True)
   150	        return f"Error: {e}"
   151	
   152	
   153	def _get_pack_details_impl(store: Any = None, pack_name: str = "") -> str:
   154	    """Get detailed information about a specific pack."""
   155	    try:
   156	        if store is None:
   157	            store = _get_store()
   158	
   159	        if not pack_name:
   160	            return "Error: pack_name is required."
   161	
   162	        try:
   163	            pack = store.get_pack(pack_name)
   164	        except Exception as e:
   165	            logger.debug("get_pack('%s') failed: %s", pack_name, e)
   166	            return f"Error: Pack '{pack_name}' not found."
   167	
   168	        pack_type = pack.pack_type.value if hasattr(pack.pack_type, "value") else str(pack.pack_type)
   169	        source_provider = pack.source.provider.value if pack.source else "unknown"
   170	
   171	        lines = [
   172	            f"Pack: {pack.name}",
   173	            f"Type: {pack_type}",
   174	        ]
   175	
   176	        if pack.base_model:
   177	            lines.append(f"Base Model: {pack.base_model}")
   178	        if pack.version:
   179	            lines.append(f"Version: {pack.version}")
   180	        if pack.author:
   181	            lines.append(f"Author: {pack.author}")
   182	        if pack.description:
   183	            desc = pack.description[:200] + "..." if len(pack.description) > 200 else pack.description
   184	            lines.append(f"Description: {desc}")
   185	
   186	        lines.append(f"Source: {source_provider}")
   187	        if pack.source and pack.source.url:
   188	            lines.append(f"URL: {pack.source.url}")
   189	
   190	        if pack.trigger_words:
   191	            lines.append(f"Trigger Words: {', '.join(pack.trigger_words)}")
   192	
   193	        if pack.tags:
   194	            lines.append(f"Tags: {', '.join(pack.tags[:10])}")
   195	
   196	        # Dependencies
   197	        if pack.dependencies:
   198	            lines.append(f"\nDependencies ({len(pack.dependencies)}):")
   199	            for dep in pack.dependencies:
   200	                kind = dep.kind.value if hasattr(dep.kind, "value") else str(dep.kind)
   201	                filename = dep.expose.filename if dep.expose else dep.id
   202	                lines.append(f"  - {filename} ({kind})")
   203	
   204	        # Parameters (directly on Pack, not under resources)
   205	        if pack.parameters:
   206	            params = pack.parameters
   207	            lines.append("\nGeneration Parameters:")
   208	            if params.sampler:
   209	                lines.append(f"  Sampler: {params.sampler}")
   210	            if params.scheduler:
   211	                lines.append(f"  Scheduler: {params.scheduler}")
   212	            if params.steps:
   213	                lines.append(f"  Steps: {params.steps}")
   214	            if params.cfg_scale:
   215	                lines.append(f"  CFG Scale: {params.cfg_scale}")
   216	            if params.clip_skip:
   217	                lines.append(f"  Clip Skip: {params.clip_skip}")
   218	            if params.width and params.height:
   219	                lines.append(f"  Size: {params.width}x{params.height}")
   220	            if params.strength:
   221	                lines.append(f"  Strength: {params.strength}")
   222	
   223	        return "\n".join(lines)
   224	    except Exception as e:
   225	        logger.error("get_pack_details failed: %s", e, exc_info=True)
   226	        return f"Error: {e}"
   227	
   228	
   229	def _search_packs_impl(store: Any = None, query: str = "") -> str:
   230	    """Search packs by name or metadata."""

   576	def _search_civitai_impl(
   577	    store: Any = None,
   578	    civitai: Any = None,
   579	    query: str = "",
   580	    types: str = "",
   581	    sort: str = "Most Downloaded",
   582	    limit: int = 10,
   583	) -> str:
   584	    """Search for models on Civitai."""
   585	    try:
   586	        if not query:
   587	            return "Error: query is required."
   588	
   589	        limit = max(1, min(limit, _MAX_LIMIT))
   590	
   591	        if civitai is None:
   592	            if store is None:
   593	                store = _get_store()
   594	            civitai = store.pack_service.civitai
   595	
   596	        type_list = [t.strip() for t in types.split(",") if t.strip()] if types else None
   597	
   598	        response = civitai.search_models(
   599	            query=query,
   600	            types=type_list,
   601	            sort=sort,
   602	            limit=limit,
   603	        )
   604	
   605	        items = response.get("items", [])
   606	        if not items:
   607	            return f"No models found on Civitai matching '{query}'."
   608	
   609	        lines = [f"Found {len(items)} model{'s' if len(items) != 1 else ''} on Civitai:", ""]
   610	
   611	        for i, model in enumerate(items, 1):
   612	            name = model.get("name", "Unknown")
   613	            model_type = model.get("type", "Unknown")
   614	            model_id = model.get("id", 0)
   615	            versions = model.get("modelVersions", [])
   616	            version_count = len(versions)
   617	            latest = versions[0].get("name", "") if versions else ""
   618	            base = versions[0].get("baseModel", "") if versions else ""
   619	
   620	            lines.append(f"{i}. {name} ({model_type}, ID: {model_id})")
   621	            info_parts = []
   622	            if version_count:
   623	                info_parts.append(f"{version_count} version{'s' if version_count != 1 else ''}")
   624	            if latest:
   625	                info_parts.append(f"Latest: {latest}")
   626	            if base:
   627	                info_parts.append(f"Base: {base}")
   628	            if info_parts:
   629	                lines.append(f"   {', '.join(info_parts)}")
   630	
   631	        return "\n".join(lines)
   632	    except Exception as e:
   633	        logger.error("search_civitai failed: %s", e, exc_info=True)
   634	        return f"Error: {e}"

   636	
   637	def _analyze_civitai_model_impl(
   638	    store: Any = None,
   639	    civitai: Any = None,
   640	    url: str = "",
   641	) -> str:
   642	    """Analyze a Civitai model: versions, files, base model, tags."""
   643	    try:
   644	        if not url:
   645	            return "Error: url is required."
   646	
   647	        if civitai is None:
   648	            if store is None:
   649	                store = _get_store()
   650	            civitai = store.pack_service.civitai
   651	
   652	        model_id, version_id = civitai.parse_civitai_url(url)
   653	        model_data = civitai.get_model(model_id)
   654	
   655	        name = model_data.get("name", "Unknown")
   656	        model_type = model_data.get("type", "Unknown")
   657	        tags = model_data.get("tags", [])
   658	        creator = model_data.get("creator", {})
   659	        creator_name = creator.get("username", "Unknown") if creator else "Unknown"
   660	        description = model_data.get("description", "")
   661	        if description and len(description) > 300:
   662	            description = description[:300] + "..."
   663	
   664	        lines = [
   665	            f"Model: {name}",
   666	            f"Type: {model_type}",
   667	            f"ID: {model_id}",
   668	            f"Creator: {creator_name}",
   669	        ]
   670	
   671	        if tags:
   672	            lines.append(f"Tags: {', '.join(tags[:10])}")
   673	        if description:
   674	            lines.append(f"Description: {description}")
   675	
   676	        versions = model_data.get("modelVersions", [])
   677	        lines.append(f"\nVersions ({len(versions)}):")
   678	
   679	        for v in versions:
   680	            v_name = v.get("name", "")
   681	            v_id = v.get("id", 0)
   682	            base = v.get("baseModel", "")
   683	            files = v.get("files", [])
   684	            total_size = sum(f.get("sizeKB", 0) for f in files)
   685	            trained_words = v.get("trainedWords", [])
   686	
   687	            lines.append(f"\n  {v_name} (ID: {v_id})")
   688	            if base:
   689	                lines.append(f"    Base Model: {base}")
   690	            if files:
   691	                lines.append(f"    Files: {len(files)}, Total: {_format_size(int(total_size * 1024))}")
   692	                for f in files:
   693	                    f_name = f.get("name", "")
   694	                    f_size = f.get("sizeKB", 0)
   695	                    primary = " [primary]" if f.get("primary") else ""
   696	                    lines.append(f"      - {f_name} ({_format_size(int(f_size * 1024))}){primary}")
   697	            if trained_words:
   698	                lines.append(f"    Trigger Words: {', '.join(trained_words)}")
   699	
   700	        return "\n".join(lines)
   701	    except ValueError as e:
   702	        return f"Error: {e}"
   703	    except Exception as e:
   704	        logger.error("analyze_civitai_model failed: %s", e, exc_info=True)
   705	        return f"Error: {e}"
   706	
   707

   185	    def test_engine_is_lazy(self, tmp_path):
   186	        """Engine is not created during init."""

   192	# =============================================================================
   193	# TestExecuteTask
   194	# =============================================================================
   195	
   196	
   197	class TestExecuteTask:
   198	    """Test execute_task method."""
   199	
   200	    def test_happy_path(self, tmp_path):
   201	        """Successful execution returns TaskResult with output."""
   202	        reg = _make_registry(FakeExtractionTask())
   203	        service = _make_service(tmp_path, registry=reg, cache_enabled=False)
   204	
   205	        mock_engine = MagicMock()
   206	        mock_engine.chat_sync.return_value = FakeBridgeResponse(
   207	            content='{"sampler": "DPM++ 2M", "steps": 20}',
   208	            success=True,
   209	        )
   210	        service._engine = mock_engine
   211	        service._current_task_type = "fake_extraction"
   212	
   213	        result = service.execute_task("fake_extraction", "Use DPM++ 2M with 20 steps")
   214	
   215	        assert result.success is True
   216	        assert result.output["sampler"] == "DPM++ 2M"
   217	        assert result.output["steps"] == 20
   218	        assert result.provider_id == "avatar:gemini"
   219	        assert result.cached is False
   220	        mock_engine.chat_sync.assert_called_once()
   221	
   222	    def test_cache_hit_no_engine_call(self, tmp_path):
   223	        """Cache hit returns cached result without calling engine."""
   224	        reg = _make_registry(FakeExtractionTask())
   225	        service = _make_service(tmp_path, registry=reg, cache_enabled=True)
   226	
   227	        mock_engine = MagicMock()
   228	        mock_engine.chat_sync.return_value = FakeBridgeResponse(
   229	            content='{"sampler": "Euler"}',
   230	            success=True,
   231	        )
   232	        service._engine = mock_engine
   233	        service._current_task_type = "fake_extraction"
   234	
   235	        # First call
   236	        r1 = service.execute_task("fake_extraction", "Test description")
   237	        assert r1.success is True
   238	        assert r1.cached is False
   239	        assert mock_engine.chat_sync.call_count == 1
   240	
   241	        # Second call - cache hit
   242	        r2 = service.execute_task("fake_extraction", "Test description")
   243	        assert r2.success is True
   244	        assert r2.cached is True
   245	        assert mock_engine.chat_sync.call_count == 1
   246	
   247	    def test_unknown_task_type(self, tmp_path):
   248	        """Unknown task type returns error result."""
   249	        reg = TaskRegistry()
   250	        service = _make_service(tmp_path, registry=reg)
   251	
   252	        result = service.execute_task("nonexistent", "test")
   253	        assert result.success is False
   254	        assert "Unknown task type" in result.error
   255	
   256	    def test_empty_input(self, tmp_path):
   257	        """Empty input returns error result."""

   259	        service = _make_service(tmp_path, registry=reg)
   260	
   261	        result = service.execute_task("fake_extraction", "")

   263	        assert "Empty" in result.error
   264	
   265	        result2 = service.execute_task("fake_extraction", "   ")
   266	        assert result2.success is False
   267

   270	        reg = _make_registry(FakeTaskWithFallback())
   271	        service = _make_service(tmp_path, registry=reg, cache_enabled=False)

   547	# =============================================================================
   548	# TestExtractedByTracking

   550	
   551	
   552	class TestExtractedByTracking:
   553	    """Test _extracted_by and _ai_fields metadata."""
   554	
   555	    def test_extracted_by_provider(self, tmp_path):
   556	        """Output includes _extracted_by = 'avatar:<provider>'."""
   557	        reg = _make_registry(FakeExtractionTask())
   558	        service = _make_service(tmp_path, registry=reg, provider="gemini",
   559	                                cache_enabled=False)
   560	
   561	        mock_engine = MagicMock()
   562	        mock_engine.chat_sync.return_value = FakeBridgeResponse(
   563	            content='{"steps": 20}',
   564	            success=True,
   565	        )
   566	        service._engine = mock_engine
   567	        service._current_task_type = "fake_extraction"
   568	
   569	        result = service.execute_task("fake_extraction", "Test")
   570	        assert result.output["_extracted_by"] == "avatar:gemini"
   571	
   572	    def test_ai_fields_list(self, tmp_path):
   573	        """Output includes _ai_fields listing non-private keys."""
   574	        reg = _make_registry(FakeExtractionTask())
   575	        service = _make_service(tmp_path, registry=reg, cache_enabled=False)
   576	
   577	        mock_engine = MagicMock()
   578	        mock_engine.chat_sync.return_value = FakeBridgeResponse(
   579	            content='{"steps": 20, "sampler": "Euler"}',
   580	            success=True,
   581	        )
   582	        service._engine = mock_engine
   583	        service._current_task_type = "fake_extraction"
   584	
   585	        result = service.execute_task("fake_extraction", "Test")
   586	        assert set(result.output["_ai_fields"]) == {"steps", "sampler"}

   589	# =============================================================================
   590	# TestJsonParsing
   591	# =============================================================================
   592	
   593	
   594	class TestJsonParsing:
   595	    """Test _extract_json standalone function."""
   596	
   597	    def test_plain_json(self):
   598	        result = _extract_json('{"steps": 20, "sampler": "Euler"}')
   599	        assert result == {"steps": 20, "sampler": "Euler"}
   600	
   601	    def test_markdown_fences(self):
   602	        text = '```json\n{"steps": 20}\n```'
   603	        result = _extract_json(text)
   604	        assert result == {"steps": 20}
   605	
   606	    def test_text_around_json(self):
   607	        text = 'Here are the params:\n{"steps": 20, "cfg": 7}\nDone!'
   608	        result = _extract_json(text)
   609	        assert result == {"steps": 20, "cfg": 7}
   610	
   611	    def test_invalid_json_raises(self):
   612	        with pytest.raises(json.JSONDecodeError):
   613	            _extract_json("This is not JSON at all")
   614	
   615	    def test_empty_string_raises(self):
   616	        with pytest.raises(json.JSONDecodeError):
   617	            _extract_json("")
   618	
   619	    def test_nested_json(self):
   620	        text = '{"hires_fix": {"upscaler": "4x", "steps": 10}}'

    20	
    21	test.describe('Avatar Provider Detection', () => {
    22	  test('status endpoint reports active provider', async ({ page }) => {
    23	    const data = await apiGet(page, '/api/avatar/status')
    24	    // active_provider is one of the known providers or null
    25	    if (data.state === 'ready') {
    26	      expect(['gemini', 'claude', 'codex']).toContain(data.active_provider)
    27	    } else {
    28	      // When not ready, active_provider should be null
    29	      expect(data.active_provider).toBeNull()
    30	    }
    31	  })
    32	
    33	  test('providers endpoint lists CLI availability', async ({ page }) => {
    34	    const data = await apiGet(page, '/api/avatar/providers')
    35	    expect(Array.isArray(data)).toBe(true)
    36	    // At least one provider should be installed on a dev machine
    37	    const installed = data.filter((p: any) => p.installed)
    38	    expect(installed.length).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(1)
    39	  })
    40	
    41	  test('config endpoint shows provider settings', async ({ page }) => {
    42	    const data = await apiGet(page, '/api/avatar/config')
    43	    expect(data.provider_configs).toBeDefined()
    44	    expect(typeof data.provider_configs).toBe('object')
    45	    // Should have entries for known providers
    46	    const keys = Object.keys(data.provider_configs)
    47	    expect(keys.length).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(1)
    48	    // Each provider config has model and enabled fields
    49	    for (const [, config] of Object.entries(data.provider_configs) as [
    50	      string,
    51	      any,
    52	    ][]) {
    53	      expect(config).toHaveProperty('enabled')
    54	      expect(typeof config.enabled).toBe('boolean')
    55	    }
    56	  })
    57	})
    58	
    59	test.describe('Avatar Provider Switching @live', () => {
    60	  test.describe.configure({ mode: 'serial' })
    61	  test('@live switch provider via settings UI and verify status', async ({
    62	    page,
    63	  }) => {
    64	    const statusBefore = await apiGet(page, '/api/avatar/status')
    65	    if (statusBefore.state !== 'ready') {
    66	      test.skip(true, 'Avatar not ready — cannot test provider switching')
    67	    }
    68	    const providerBefore = statusBefore.active_provider
    69	
    70	    await navigateTo(page, '/settings')
    71	
    72	    // Find provider buttons (gemini, claude, codex)
    73	    const providerBtns = page
    74	      .locator('button')
    75	      .filter({ hasText: /gemini|claude|codex/i })
    76	    const count = await providerBtns.count()
    77	    if (count < 2) {
    78	      test.skip(true, 'Less than 2 provider buttons — cannot test switching')
    79	    }
    80	
    81	    // Click a different provider than the current one
    82	    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    83	      const btnText = await providerBtns.nth(i).innerText()
    84	      if (!btnText.toLowerCase().includes(providerBefore)) {
    85	        await providerBtns.nth(i).scrollIntoViewIfNeeded()
    86	        await providerBtns.nth(i).click({ force: true })
    87	        await page.waitForTimeout(2_000)
    88	        break
    89	      }
    90	    }
    91	
    92	    // Verify status changed (or at least still valid)
    93	    const statusAfter = await apiGet(page, '/api/avatar/status')
    94	    expect(statusAfter.state).toBeTruthy()
    95	    // Restore original provider if changed
    96	    if (statusAfter.active_provider !== providerBefore) {
    97	      for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    98	        const btnText = await providerBtns.nth(i).innerText()
    99	        if (btnText.toLowerCase().includes(providerBefore)) {
   100	          await providerBtns.nth(i).scrollIntoViewIfNeeded()
   101	          await providerBtns.nth(i).click({ force: true })
   102	          await page.waitForTimeout(2_000)
   103	          break
   104	        }
   105	      }
   106	    }
   107	  })
   108	
   109	  test('@live chat works after provider switch', async ({ page }) => {
   110	    await navigateTo(page, '/settings')
   111	    const providerBtns = page
   112	      .locator('button')
   113	      .filter({ hasText: /gemini|claude|codex/i })
   114	    const count = await providerBtns.count()
   115	    if (count >= 1) {
   116	      await providerBtns.first().scrollIntoViewIfNeeded()
   117	      await providerBtns.first().click({ force: true })
   118	      await page.waitForTimeout(2_000)
   119	    }
   120	
   121	    // Navigate to home and try chatting
   122	    await navigateTo(page, '/')
   123	    await openCompactMode(page)
   124	    try {
   125	      await page.waitForSelector(SEL_COMPACT_MESSAGES, {
   126	        state: 'visible',
   127	        timeout: 15_000,
   128	      })
   129	    } catch {
   130	      test.skip(true, 'WebSocket not connected after provider switch')
   131	    }
   132	
   133	    await sendCompactMessage(page, 'Say hello in one word')
   134	    const msgs = page.locator(SEL_COMPACT_MSG_BUBBLE)
   135	    await expect(async () => {
   136	      const msgCount = await msgs.count()
   137	      expect(msgCount).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(2)
   138	    }).toPass({ timeout: 60_000 })
   139	  })
   140	
   141	  test('@live provider version is reported', async ({ page }) => {
   142	    const data = await apiGet(page, '/api/ai/providers')
   143	    const entries = Object.entries(data.providers) as [string, any][]
   144	    // At least one available provider should report a version
   145	    const available = entries.filter(([, s]) => s.available)
   146	    if (available.length === 0) {
   147	      test.skip(true, 'No available AI providers')
   148	    }
   149	    // Version is a string or null — at least one should have a version
   150	    const withVersion = available.filter(
   151	      ([, s]) => s.version && typeof s.version === 'string',
   152	    )
   153	    expect(withVersion.length).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(1)
   154	  })
   155	})

     1	/**
     2	 * Avatar API Endpoints — Tier 1 (offline, no AI provider needed)
     3	 *
     4	 * Tests backend API endpoints from Iterace 1-2 (feature flag, config, routes)
     5	 * and AI service endpoints from Iterace 3-4, 6.
     6	 * Uses page.request (Playwright API context) — no UI interaction needed.
     7	 *
     8	 * Run with: pnpm e2e --grep-invert @live
     9	 */
    10	
    11	import { test, expect } from '@playwright/test'
    12	import { apiGet } from './helpers/avatar.helpers'
    13	
    14	test.describe('Avatar API Endpoints', () => {
    15	  test('GET /api/avatar/status returns valid state', async ({ page }) => {
    16	    const data = await apiGet(page, '/api/avatar/status')
    17	    expect(data.state).toBeTruthy()
    18	    expect([
    19	      'ready',
    20	      'no_provider',
    21	      'no_engine',
    22	      'setup_required',
    23	      'disabled',
    24	      'incompatible',
    25	    ]).toContain(data.state)
    26	    expect(typeof data.engine_installed).toBe('boolean')
    27	    // engine_version is string or null
    28	    expect(
    29	      data.engine_version === null || typeof data.engine_version === 'string',
    30	    ).toBe(true)
    31	    expect(typeof data.available).toBe('boolean')
    32	    expect(typeof data.enabled).toBe('boolean')
    33	  })
    34	
    35	  test('GET /api/avatar/config returns config', async ({ page }) => {
    36	    const data = await apiGet(page, '/api/avatar/config')
    37	    expect(typeof data.enabled).toBe('boolean')
    38	    expect(data.provider).toBeTruthy()
    39	    expect(data.skills_count).toBeDefined()
    40	    expect(typeof data.skills_count.builtin).toBe('number')
    41	    expect(data.skills_count.builtin).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(1)
    42	    // Skills object has builtin/custom arrays
    43	    expect(Array.isArray(data.skills.builtin)).toBe(true)
    44	    expect(Array.isArray(data.skills.custom)).toBe(true)
    45	  })
    46	
    47	  test('GET /api/avatar/providers returns list', async ({ page }) => {
    48	    const data = await apiGet(page, '/api/avatar/providers')
    49	    expect(Array.isArray(data)).toBe(true)
    50	    expect(data.length).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(1)
    51	    for (const provider of data) {
    52	      expect(provider).toHaveProperty('name')
    53	      expect(typeof provider.installed).toBe('boolean')
    54	      expect(provider).toHaveProperty('command')
    55	    }
    56	  })
    57	
    58	  test('GET /api/avatar/skills returns skills', async ({ page }) => {
    59	    const data = await apiGet(page, '/api/avatar/skills')
    60	    expect(Array.isArray(data.builtin)).toBe(true)
    61	    for (const skill of data.builtin) {
    62	      expect(skill).toHaveProperty('name')
    63	      expect(skill).toHaveProperty('path')
    64	      expect(typeof skill.size).toBe('number')
    65	      expect(skill).toHaveProperty('category')
    66	    }
    67	  })
    68	
    69	  test('GET /api/avatar/avatars returns avatars', async ({ page }) => {
    70	    const data = await apiGet(page, '/api/avatar/avatars')
    71	    expect(Array.isArray(data.builtin)).toBe(true)
    72	    expect(data.builtin.length).toBe(8)
    73	    const ids = data.builtin.map((a: any) => a.id)
    74	    for (const expected of [
    75	      'bella',
    76	      'heart',
    77	      'nicole',
    78	      'sky',
    79	      'adam',
    80	      'michael',
    81	      'george',
    82	      'astronautka',
    83	    ]) {
    84	      expect(ids).toContain(expected)
    85	    }
    86	    // Custom array is optional but should be an array if present
    87	    if (data.custom !== undefined) {
    88	      expect(Array.isArray(data.custom)).toBe(true)
    89	    }
    90	  })
    91	
    92	  test('GET /api/ai/providers detects providers', async ({ page }) => {
    93	    const data = await apiGet(page, '/api/ai/providers')
    94	    expect(data.providers).toBeDefined()
    95	    expect(typeof data.providers).toBe('object')
    96	    expect(typeof data.available_count).toBe('number')
    97	    expect(typeof data.running_count).toBe('number')
    98	    // Each provider has expected fields
    99	    for (const [, status] of Object.entries(data.providers) as [string, any][]) {
   100	      expect(typeof status.available).toBe('boolean')
   101	      expect(typeof status.running).toBe('boolean')
   102	      expect(Array.isArray(status.models)).toBe(true)
   103	    }
   104	  })
   105	
   106	  test('GET /api/ai/settings returns config', async ({ page }) => {
   107	    const data = await apiGet(page, '/api/ai/settings')
   108	    expect(typeof data.enabled).toBe('boolean')
   109	    expect(typeof data.providers).toBe('object')
   110	    expect(typeof data.task_priorities).toBe('object')
   111	    expect(typeof data.cache_enabled).toBe('boolean')
   112	  })
   113	
   114	  test('GET /api/ai/cache/stats returns stats', async ({ page }) => {
   115	    const data = await apiGet(page, '/api/ai/cache/stats')
   116	    expect(typeof data.entry_count).toBe('number')
   117	    expect(typeof data.total_size_bytes).toBe('number')
   118	    expect(typeof data.total_size_mb).toBe('number')
   119	    expect(typeof data.ttl_days).toBe('number')
   120	  })
   121	
   122	  test('GET /api/ai/tasks returns registered task types', async ({ page }) => {
   123	    const data = await apiGet(page, '/api/ai/tasks')
   124	    expect(Array.isArray(data.tasks)).toBe(true)
   125	    expect(data.tasks.length).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(1)
   126	    // parameter_extraction must be registered
   127	    const paramTask = data.tasks.find(
   128	      (t: any) => t.task_type === 'parameter_extraction',
   129	    )
   130	    expect(paramTask).toBeDefined()
   131	    expect(Array.isArray(paramTask.skill_names)).toBe(true)
   132	    expect(paramTask.skill_names).toContain('generation-params')
   133	    expect(typeof paramTask.has_fallback).toBe('boolean')
   134	    expect(paramTask.has_fallback).toBe(true)
   135	  })
   136	
   137	  test('status endpoint remains consistent after sequential calls', async ({
   138	    page,
   139	  }) => {
   140	    const first = await apiGet(page, '/api/avatar/status')
   141	    expect(first.state).toBeTruthy()
   142	
   143	    // Second call should return the same state (cached or consistent)
   144	    const second = await apiGet(page, '/api/avatar/status')
   145	    expect(second.state).toBe(first.state)
